tools.name: list_courses
tools.title: List Canvas courses
tools.description: List the signed-in teacher's Canvas courses via the connected Canvas account. Requires the user to have connected Canvas in Allen.

tools.name: list_assignments
tools.title: List assignments in a Canvas course
tools.description: List assignments for a specific Canvas course belonging to the signed-in teacher. Provide the numeric Canvas course id.

courseId.description: The Canvas course id (as returned by list_courses).

tools.name: list_assignments_needing_grading
tools.title: List assignments needing grading
tools.description: List all assignments across the signed-in teacher's Canvas courses that currently have submissions needing grading.
